name: brain_decide_cognitive_sequence
observations: brain_decide() function location: /home/bbrelin/nimcp/src/core/brain/nimcp_brain_part_core.c lines 917-3349
Total function length: ~2432 lines with 35+ cognitive stages
Stages organized into 10 major phases: PreForward, Forward, PostForward, Reasoning, Memory, Emotional, Glial, Theory-of-Mind, Transcript, Consensus

name: cognitive_module_sequence_detailed
observations: STAGE 0 (lines 1010-1234): PARALLEL PRE-FORWARD — Wellbeing, Engram recall, Sleep state, Curiosity. Runs on inference_pool if available (3x speedup), falls back to serial.
STAGE 1 (lines 1237-1284): Predictive Processing — Generate prediction, Positional encoding, Multihead attention. Uses predictive_network. Prediction freed later.
EMBEDDING RELEVANCE (lines 1286-1302): GPU batch recompute of synapse relevance. Calls embedding_pool_recompute_relevance() when num_features == embedding_dim.
FORWARD PASS (line 1313): perform_forward_pass() — ANN inference. Feeds features through neural network.
RECURRENT ITERATIONS (lines 1315-1348): Optional iterative refinement if confidence too low. Blends output back into features.
SPARSE CODING (lines 1354-1366): cortical_sparse_enforce_sparsity() — enforces sparsity patterns, updates thresholds.

CLASSIFICATION FAST PATH (lines 1369-1401): EARLY EXIT for pure classification tasks. Skips all expensive cognitive stages if strategy->task_type == BRAIN_TASK_CLASSIFICATION && !enable_natural_explanations.
HEMISPHERIC PROCESSING (lines 1404-1470): Corpus callosum transfer, lateralization effects.
SENSORY SNN ENCODING (lines 1472-1549): Modality-gated visual/audio/somatosensory/speech spike encoding.
CROSS-MODAL TEMPORAL ALIGNMENT (lines 1552-1614): Synchronizes spike timing across sensory modalities.
PREDICTION ERROR (lines 1620-1648): L2 distance between prediction and output, feeds EDP.
SLEEP-INDUCED NOISE (lines 1656-1669): REM sleep adds gaussian noise proportional to sleep_noise_level.
EDGE-CLOUD HYBRID (lines 1675-1690): Confidence-gated routing to cloud backend.
SLEEP DEGRADATION (line 1698): Multiply confidence by sleep_confidence_multiplier.
MEMORY CONSOLIDATION (lines 1701-1746): Engram consolidation, systems consolidation, SNN sleep consolidation.
WORKING MEMORY TRANSFER (lines 1780-1784): wm_transfer_evaluate().
SEMANTIC MEMORY (lines 1786-1794): semantic_memory_query() and consolidation extraction.

name: expensive_cognitive_modules
observations: REASONING ENGINE (lines 1798-1830): Multi-step reasoning, causal inference. Runs reasoning_engine_reason(). Can be gated by brain->reasoning_engine_enabled.
INNER DIALOGUE (lines 1833-1873): 7-perspective deliberation on decision. Runs inner_dialogue_engine_run(). Gated by brain->inner_dialogue_enabled.
IMAGINATION ENGINE (lines 1876-1919): Prospective simulation (3 steps). Gated by brain->imagination_enabled.
RECURSIVE COGNITION (lines 1922-1957): Goal decomposition for complex tasks. Gated by brain->rcog_engine_enabled.
COLLECTIVE COGNITION (lines 1960-1974): Multi-brain sync. Gated by brain->collective_cognition_enabled.
EXECUTIVE CONTROL (lines 1977-2007): Goal-directed behavior, inhibition. Gated by brain->config.enable_executive_control.
NATURAL EXPLANATIONS (lines 2063-2093): Natural language generation via explanation_generator. Gated by brain->config.enable_natural_explanations. Already excluded by classify_fast_path.
WORKING MEMORY INTEGRATION (lines 2096-2156): Working memory storage with salience computation. Gated by brain->config.enable_working_memory.
GLOBAL WORKSPACE COMPETITION (lines 2159-2214): Module competition for conscious access. Gated by brain->config.enable_global_workspace.
TOP-DOWN SENSORY PREDICTION (lines 2217-2307): SNN language bridge prediction. Gated by brain->snn_lang_bridge.
EMOTIONAL TAGGING (lines 2310-2355): Valence/arousal computation. Gated by brain->config.enable_emotional_tagging.
BIDIRECTIONAL COGNITIVE FEEDBACK (lines 2358-2464): Module cross-talk (curiosity-executive, mirror-visual, emotion-salience, audio-speech).
SPEECH SNN BRIDGE PRODUCTION (lines 2466-2559): Phoneme synthesis via formant synth + LNN prosody. Gated by active_modalities & BRAIN_MODALITY_SPEECH.
GLIAL CELL MODULATION (lines 2562-2577): Glial updates every 50 cycles. Gated by brain->config.enable_glial.
THEORY OF MIND (lines 2580-2633): Self-model tracking, agent intention prediction. Gated by brain->config.enable_theory_of_mind.
MENTAL HEALTH MONITORING (lines 2636-2676): Behavioral disorder detection, quarantine mode. Gated by brain->config.enable_mental_health_monitoring.
ETHICS ENGINE (lines 2679-2722): Golden Rule evaluation, blocks unethical actions. Gated by brain->config.enable_ethics.
EPISTEMIC FILTERING (lines 2725-2788): Bias detection, conspiracy pattern detection. Gated by brain->epistemic.
MIRROR NEURON EXECUTION (lines 2791-2833): Action recording in mirror system. Gated by brain->config.enable_mirror_neurons.
SHANNON/QUANTUM SHANNON (lines 2836-2852): Information flow analysis. Gated by brain->enable_shannon_monitoring and brain->enable_quantum_shannon_diffusion.

name: cognitive_subsystem_inference_c5
observations: STAGE C5 (lines 2860-2959): COGNITIVE SUBSYSTEM INFERENCE — runs 5 independent modules during inference, each can be gated.
C5.1 Parietal step (line 2866): parietal_step(brain->parietal, 1000)
C5.2 Predictive hierarchy (lines 2870-2892): Temporal prediction from features, modulates confidence. Gated by brain->pred_hierarchy_enabled.
C5.3 VAE anomaly (lines 2895-2901): Flags unusual inputs, reduces confidence if anomaly > 0.8. Gated by brain->vae_enabled.
C5.4 JEPA predictor (lines 2904-2928): Latent-space prediction enrichment. Gated by brain->jepa_predictor_enabled.
C5.5 FEP-Parietal (lines 2931-2958): Active inference, builds problem state, calls fep_parietal_active_inference(). Runs on parietal_get_fep_bridge().
All C5 modules compute extra confidence modulation — 5% to 10% per-module gains

name: inference_time_cognitive_training_c6
observations: STAGE C6 (lines 2962-3118): INFERENCE-TIME COGNITIVE TRAINING — 10 online learning modules run every N decisions (default N=5)
Gated by cognitive_train_interval config. Counter-based execution: (cognitive_train_counter % interval) == 0
C6.1 Grounded language (lines 2978-2982): grounded_language_learn_from_text(), grounded_language_learn_syntax()
C6.2 Knowledge system (lines 2985-2989): knowledge_learn_from_text()
C6.3 VAE (lines 2992-3002): vae_training_step() — self-supervised autoencoding
C6.4 FEP-Parietal (lines 3005-3013): fep_parietal_train_model(fep_bridge, &obs_ptr, &tgt_ptr, 1)
C6.5 Parietal physics NN (lines 3016-3023): parietal_train_physics_nn() — learns dynamics
C6.6 JEPA predictor (lines 3026-3044): jepa_predictor_train_step()
C6.7 Creative training (lines 3047-3057): creative_training_submit_feedback() with confidence-based rating
C6.8 Self-heal engine (lines 3060-3071): self_heal_train_online() — learns from inference success/failure
C6.9 Intuition system (lines 3074-3087): intuition_train_from_experience()
C6.10 FEP orchestrator (lines 3090-3097): Updates free energy metrics from inference implicit loss
All C6 modules run in single conditional block. Disabling is not granular — all-or-nothing by cognitive_train_interval.

name: transcript_population
observations: TRANSCRIPT STAGE (lines 3121-3318): Populates cognitive_transcript_t from all stage outputs for response composition
transcript_create() allocates new transcript struct
transcript_add() inserts module entries with salience, confidence, summary
Modules recorded: engram, curiosity, predictive, reasoning, emotion, ethics, epistemic, fep_parietal, pred_hierarchy, vae, jepa, grounded_lang, sensory_snn, knowledge, natural_explanation
transcript_finalize(t) computes coherence, cognitive_load, dominant_module, response hints
Copy stored on brain->last_transcript for API access after decision freed
decision->transcript = t (stored in returned decision struct)

name: existing_gating_mechanisms
observations: CLASSIFY_FAST_PATH (lines 1369-1401): Existing skip logic for classification-only tasks. Conditions: strategy->task_type == BRAIN_TASK_CLASSIFICATION && !enable_natural_explanations. Early returns at line 1400.
MODALITY GATING (line 1480+): Sensory SNN bridges check active_modalities bitmask before encoding
PARALLEL PRE-FORWARD (line 1032): Falls back to serial if inference_pool not available
POST_FORWARD_SUBMITTED (line 1731): Stages 3.8-3.11 skip if submitted to thread pool
ENABLE FLAGS PATTERN: ~40 enable_* config flags gate individual modules: enable_glial, enable_theory_of_mind, enable_ethics, enable_emotional_tagging, enable_mirror_neurons, etc.
COUNTER-BASED GATING: cognitive_train_interval and glial_update_counter use modulo checks

name: training_context_struct
observations: brain->training_ctx field exists (nimcp_brain_training_ctx_t*) at line 411 of nimcp_brain_internal.h
training_ctx used by brain_learn_vector() and training pipeline
NO existing 'training_mode' or 'is_training' flag in brain struct
brain->config.enable_training_integration boolean exists but only enables subsystem, not a decision-time gate

name: gating_design_recommendation
observations: OPTION A (Minimal): Add single bool brain->training_mode_active. Gate expensive stages at inference-time decision points (reasoning, dialogue, imagination, etc.) with && !brain->training_mode_active.
OPTION B (Fine-grained): Add training_gating_config_t with per-module skip flags. Allows selective disabling of subsets (e.g., skip reasoning but keep imagination).
OPTION C (Strategy-driven): Extend task_strategy_t to include training_skip_modules bitmask. Allows task definition to control cognitive gating per strategy.
RECOMMENDED: Option A + Option C combined. Simple global flag for quick training speedup. Strategy-driven granular control for advanced use cases.

GATE POINTS IDENTIFIED: Lines 1811 (reasoning), 1846 (dialogue), 1888 (imagination), 1934 (rcog), 2068 (explanations-already gated), 2102 (working_memory), 2315 (emotional), 2685 (ethics), 2743 (epistemic), 2790 (mirror), 2839 (shannon), 2968 (C6 training loop).
